RIPPLE - Who Does What (WP x Partners)

WP x Partner dashboard with status and description tracking plus partner-structured drilldown.

Manage Data Open Gantt
WP lead Cell badges: `TL` task lead count, `P` task participant count Statuses + descriptions come from `Manage Data` Click a partner name for full partner structure

WP Cards (Lead, Top Contributors, Task Ownership)
